# 第三方 Godot 兼容素材

> CC0 / 免费可商用 · 补充 Kenney 未覆盖项

---

## 已下载（本地）

| 包 | 路径 | 许可 | 用途 |
|----|------|------|------|
| **KayKit Prototype Bits** | `kaykit-prototype-bits/extracted/` | CC0 | 3D 原型占位 · glTF/OBJ |
| Kenney Digital Audio | `../kenney/digital-audio/` | CC0 | 射击/科幻音效 |
| Kenney RPG Sounds | `../kenney/rpg-sounds/` | CC0 | UI/道具音效 |

---

## 推荐在线参考（未本地克隆，体积过大）

| 资源 | URL | 说明 |
|------|-----|------|
| Godot 官方 Demo | https://github.com/godotengine/godot-demo-projects | 2D/3D 范例代码 |
| Ninja Adventure | https://pixel-boy.itch.io/ninja-adventure-asset-pack | CC0 · 含 Godot 4 示例工程 |
| Kenney Food Kit | https://kenney-assets.itch.io/food-kit | life_sim 3D 食物 |
| Kenney Pixel Food Expansion | https://kenney-assets.itch.io/pixel-platformer-food-expansion | 2D 食物 tile |
| Godot Asset Library | https://godotengine.org/asset-library/asset?filter=free | 按 CC0 筛选 |
| itch.io Godot+Sprites | https://itch.io/game-assets/free/tag-godot/tag-sprites | 免费 2D 包 |

---

## 重新下载

```powershell
python 05-工具脚本/download_assets.py
```

KayKit 手动：

```powershell
# 见 download_assets.py 或从 GitHub 拉取
# https://github.com/KayKit-Game-Assets/KayKit-Prototype-Bits-1.0
```
